heading: Powers
label: 50106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5010636:3702., , .Dec. 9, 1985Pub. L. 99–172, § 299 Stat. 1020The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
